scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec api npx jest
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec api npx jest --coverage
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:up && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec api npx jest --coverage; npm run test:down
scripts.db:audit-logs: docker exec flowboard-db psql -U postgres -d flowboard -c 'SELECT * FROM "AuditLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 10;'
